name: Peanut Butter Muffins WW
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chunky peanut butter, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Sift together flour and sugar.
3. Add remaining ingredients; stir until combined. Do not beat or overmix.
4. Spray 4 muffin cups with cooking spray.
5. Fill 3/4 of the cups with batter.
6. Fill the remaining 1/4 of the cups with water.
7. Bake until golden brown, about 20 minutes.
8. Remove muffins to a wire rack and cool.
Weight Watcher Exchanges: 1 Protein, 1/2 Bread, 1 Fat, 20 Optional Calories.
Nutritional Analysis per serving: 160 calories, 7 g protein, 8 g fat, 15 g carbohydrate, 110 mg sodium, 69 mg cholesterol.
